rationale: Large (859KB) tuberculosis-surveillance platform PR. The error-swallow detector fires on supabase/functions/detect-hotspots/index.ts at `} catch (_err) { }` — a bare empty catch (the underscore-prefixed parameter is a convention saying 'intentional swallow', but the catch body itself is empty). The catch silently absorbs failures from the app_settings.dbscan database load and falls back to hard-coded defaults. The detector correctly flags this per the v1.1.0 spec (bare empty catches stay block; only comment-explained empties downgrade to info). PR was closed without merge by the reviewer. We don't have visibility into which specific concerns drove the closure, but the cheat pattern is present in the diff regardless.
